node.title: Getting LaidOff !! || Requesting help from community || Need job in order to sustain my family

article.title: Getting LaidOff !! || Requesting help from community || Need job in order to sustain my family
article.content:
Hi Leetcoders,

Currently being laid off from my current company due to unnecessary cost cutting bullshit happening at my organization.

Trying to search jobs. I am continuously applying but not able to get any callback. I am in a very bad and desparate situation right now. Need job in order to sustain my family.

I am currently preparing for the interviews and feel a bit confident.

It would be great if my tech fellows could refer me for any of the SWE profiles in their companies or can directly send my resume to the hiring team or hiring manager.

Any leads or help will be very much helpful to me.

Location: India
YOE: 1 year 11 months

Resume: https://tinyurl.com/mrxpmk5m

post.content: Bro, if a layoff is causing you issues to maintain your family livelyhood even for a month or two, you need financial planning first.
If you are struggling to find a job, i think i should die rn ig \uD83D\uDE2D
You have an impressive profile. You would definitely land a great position.
referred you to a position, please apply to workday links
add open to work in your linkedin profile
If you are struggling then the rest are dammed!
